verdicts.diagnostic: Re-authored under three-gate carve-out (story 3 amendment at 81f00c6) to align with story 10's healthy-exclusion rule. Pre-fix red against parent commit (unfixed filter_frontier admitted healthy ids): the new fixture's proposed id 93104 would not appear because the frontier renderer would also include healthy 93102 and 93103, and the pre-amendment assertions would have asserted the healthy ids in the rendering. Green at 81f00c6 (this commit) under the filter_frontier fix at d9fb9f5.

Re-authored under three-gate carve-out (story 3 amendment at 81f00c6) to add a non-healthy fixture row so frontier stories[] has at least one row to land era_head_id assertions on. Pre-fix the test reds because filter_frontier admits healthy stories that the test's old assertions used as anchors; era_head_id contract pinned by the test is unchanged.
